componentDescription: Sidebar is a vertical navigation component for application-level navigation. Use it as the primary navigation structure in dashboards and admin panels. Supports collapsible sections, nested navigation items, and a collapsed/icon-only mode for compact layouts.
features: Footer slot for user profile or settings
compositionPattern: Provide navigation items as a hierarchical array. Each item has a label, icon, and optional children for nested sections. The sidebar handles active state based on current route.

usageExamples.title: Dashboard sidebar
usageExamples.description: Full application sidebar with grouped navigation items.
usageExamples.code:
<Sidebar
  logo={<Logo />}
  items={[
    { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: <HomeIcon />, onClick: () => navigate('/') },
    { id: 'analytics', label: 'Analytics', icon: <ChartIcon />, onClick: () => navigate('/analytics') },
    {
      id: 'manage',
      label: 'Management',
      icon: <FolderIcon />,
      children: [
        { id: 'users', label: 'Users', onClick: () => navigate('/users') },
        { id: 'roles', label: 'Roles', onClick: () => navigate('/roles') },
      ]
    },
    { id: 'settings', label: 'Settings', icon: <SettingsIcon />, onClick: () => navigate('/settings') },
  ]}
  footer={<UserProfileItem user={currentUser} />}
/>

usageExamples.title: Collapsible sidebar
usageExamples.description: Sidebar that can be toggled to icon-only mode.
usageExamples.code:
<Sidebar
  logo={<Logo />}
  collapsed={isSidebarCollapsed}
  onCollapse={setIsSidebarCollapsed}
  width={240}
  items={navigationItems}
  footer={<UserProfile user={user} />}
/>

items.llmContext: Required. Array of navigation item objects. Each item: { id: string, label: string, icon: ReactNode, onClick?: () => void, children?: item[], disabled?: boolean }. Children create collapsible sub-groups. Always provide an icon — it's shown in collapsed mode as the only identifier.

collapsed.llmContext: Controls whether the sidebar is in icon-only collapsed mode. Pass false for expanded (full labels visible) and true for collapsed (icons only with tooltips). Manage with useState and persist the preference to localStorage.

onCollapse.llmContext: Callback fired when the user clicks the collapse/expand toggle button. Update your collapsed state here. Typically also persist the preference.
onCollapse.propDescription: Called when user toggles collapsed state

logo.llmContext: React node for the application logo displayed at the top of the sidebar. Should work at both full and collapsed widths — provide a mark/icon version that works at ~40px wide for collapsed mode.
logo.propDescription: Logo displayed at the top of the sidebar

footer.llmContext: React node pinned to the bottom of the sidebar. Typically used for the current user's avatar/name with a settings or logout action.
footer.propDescription: Content pinned to the sidebar footer
